about.title: About NMCL
about.content: The National Muslim Council of Liberia (NMCL) is the premier organization representing Muslim communities across Liberia. Established to unite, serve, and advance the interests of Muslims in our nation, we work tirelessly to promote Islamic values, education, and community development.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To unite Muslim communities in Liberia, promote Islamic education and values, provide social welfare services, foster interfaith dialogue, and advocate for the rights and interests of Muslims in national development.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: A thriving Muslim community contributing positively to Liberia's national development while upholding Islamic principles of peace, justice, and compassion for all humanity.
